sentences.target: Ich stelle heute eine klare Forderung.

translations.de: Ich stelle heute eine klare Forderung.
translations.en: Today I'm making a clear demand.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天我提出一个明确的要求。
translations.yue: 今日我提出一個清晰嘅要求。
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi đưa ra một yêu cầu rõ ràng.
translations.nl: Vandaag stel ik een duidelijke eis.
translations.hu: Ma egy egyértelmű követelést fogalmazok meg.
translations.hi: आज मैं एक स्पष्ट मांग रख रहा हूँ।
translations.nb: I dag fremmer jeg et tydelig krav.
translations.id: Hari ini saya menyampaikan tuntutan yang jelas.
translations.sv: I dag ställer jag ett tydligt krav.
translations.da: I dag fremsætter jeg et klart krav.
translations.ja: 今日は明確な要求を出します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative; 1st person singular; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; present tense, 1st person singular; transitive; in the collocation 'eine Forderung stellen' = to make a demand.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb; indicates the time of the action.
Indefinite article; feminine singular accusative; determiner of 'Forderung'.
Attributive adjective; inflected feminine singular accusative; positive degree; modifies 'Forderung'.
Common noun; feminine; singular; accusative; direct object of 'stelle'.

sentences.target: Die Firma hat eine offene Forderung.

translations.de: Die Firma hat eine offene Forderung.
translations.en: The company has an outstanding claim.
translations.es: La empresa tiene un cobro pendiente.
translations.it: L'azienda ha una fattura in sospeso.
translations.zh-Hans: 公司有一笔未结清的应收款。
translations.yue: 公司有一筆未收回的款項。
translations.pt: A empresa tem uma fatura em aberto.
translations.vi: Công ty có hóa đơn chưa thanh toán.
translations.nl: Het bedrijf heeft een openstaande factuur.
translations.hu: A cégnek van egy kifizetetlen számlája.
translations.hi: कंपनी के पास एक बकाया बिल है।
translations.id: Perusahaan memiliki tagihan yang belum dibayar.
translations.ja: 会社には未収金がある。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine singular nominative; determiner of 'Firma'; marks the subject NP.
Common noun; feminine; singular; nominative; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb; present tense, 3rd person singular; takes a direct object.
Indefinite article; feminine singular accusative; determiner of 'Forderung'.
Attributive adjective; feminine singular accusative; positive degree; modifies 'Forderung' (here: 'outstanding').
Common noun; feminine; singular; accusative; direct object of 'hat'.

sentences.target: Er lehnt die Forderung nach mehr Zeit ab.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ leːnt diː ˈfɔʁdəʁʊŋ naːx meːɐ̯ tsaɪ̯t ap/

translations.de: Er lehnt die Forderung nach mehr Zeit ab.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ leːnt diː ˈfɔʁdəʁʊŋ naːx meːɐ̯ tsaɪ̯t ap/
translations.en: He rejects the demand for more time.
translations.es: Él rechaza la petición de más tiempo.
translations.fr: Il refuse la demande de plus de temps.
translations.it: Lui rifiuta la richiesta di più tempo.
translations.ko: 그는 더 많은 시간을 달라는 요청을 거절한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他拒绝了延长时间的要求。
translations.yue: 佢拒絕咗延長時間嘅要求。
translations.ru: Он отказал в просьбе о дополнительном времени.
translations.pt: Ele rejeita o pedido de mais tempo.
translations.he: הוא דוחה את הבקשה לעוד זמן.
translations.tr: O, daha fazla süre talebini reddediyor.
translations.vi: Anh ấy từ chối yêu cầu thêm thời gian.
translations.ar: هو يرفض طلب المزيد من الوقت.
translations.nl: Hij wijst het verzoek om meer tijd af.
translations.uk: Він відхиляє прохання про додатковий час.
translations.hu: Elutasítja a több időre vonatkozó kérést.
translations.hi: वह अधिक समय के अनुरोध को अस्वीकार करता है।
translations.pl: On odrzuca prośbę o więcej czasu.
translations.el: Απορρίπτει το αίτημα για περισσότερο χρόνο.
translations.nb: Han avslår forespørselen om mer tid.
translations.sv: Han avvisar begäran om mer tid.
translations.ro: El respinge cererea de mai mult timp.
translations.da: Han afviser ønsket om mere tid.
translations.ja: 彼はもっと時間がほしいという要望を断る。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative; 3rd person singular masculine; subject of the clause.
Finite verb; present tense, 3rd person singular; main verb; part of separable verb 'ablehnen' (linked with particle 'ab').
Definite article; feminine singular accusative; determiner of 'Forderung'.
Common noun; feminine; singular; accusative; direct object of 'lehnt'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces PP specifying the content/target of the demand.
Quantifying determiner; modifies 'Zeit'; part of NP in the dative case.
Common noun; feminine; singular; dative; object of the preposition 'nach'.
Separable verb particle; completes the verb 'ablehnen'; placed at clause end.

sentences.target: Wir begleichen die Forderung bis morgen.

translations.de: Wir begleichen die Forderung bis morgen.
translations.en: We'll pay the claim by tomorrow.
translations.fr: Nous paierons la facture d'ici demain.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们会在明天之前付清这笔款。
translations.yue: 我哋會喺聽日之前付清呢筆款。
translations.pt: Vamos pagar a fatura até amanhã.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi sẽ thanh toán trước ngày mai.
translations.nl: We betalen de factuur uiterlijk morgen.
translations.hi: हम कल तक भुगतान कर देंगे।
translations.el: Θα πληρώσουμε τον λογαριασμό μέχρι αύριο.
translations.nb: Vi betaler regningen innen i morgen.
translations.id: Kami akan membayar tagihan sebelum besok.
translations.da: Vi betaler regningen senest i morgen.
translations.ja: 請求は明日までに支払います。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative; 1st person plural; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; present tense, 1st person plural; takes a direct object; collocation 'Forderung begleichen' = to settle a claim.
Definite article; feminine singular accusative; determiner of 'Forderung'.
Common noun; feminine; singular; accusative; direct object of 'begleichen'.
Preposition indicating a temporal limit; forms the temporal complement 'bis morgen'.
Temporal adverb; complements 'bis' to express the deadline ('until tomorrow').

jp: Ich stelle heute eine klare Forderung.
Die Firma hat eine offene Forderung.
Er lehnt die Forderung nach mehr Zeit ab.
Wir begleichen die Forderung bis morgen.
fu: /eːɐ̯ leːnt diː ˈfɔʁdəʁʊŋ naːx meːɐ̯ tsaɪ̯t ap/
de: Ich stelle heute eine klare Forderung.
Die Firma hat eine offene Forderung.
Er lehnt die Forderung nach mehr Zeit ab.
Wir begleichen die Forderung bis morgen.
ipa: /eːɐ̯ leːnt diː ˈfɔʁdəʁʊŋ naːx meːɐ̯ tsaɪ̯t ap/
en: Today I'm making a clear demand.
The company has an outstanding claim.
He rejects the demand for more time.
We'll pay the claim by tomorrow.
